description: Initialize Vite React TypeScript project with all dependencies, configure Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Zustand, @dnd-kit, TanStack Table, and set up project structure with types, stores, routing, and seed data.
steps: Initialize Vite project with React + TypeScript template in /projects/sandbox/study/ using 'npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts'
Install core dependencies: react-router-dom, zustand, @dnd-kit/core, @dnd-kit/sortable, @dnd-kit/utilities, @tanstack/react-table, date-fns, lucide-react, uuid, clsx, tailwind-merge
Install dev dependencies: tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, @types/uuid
Configure Tailwind CSS with tailwind.config.ts including custom colors for dark/light themes and accent colors

Set up shadcn/ui: install and configure with components.json, install ui primitives (button, card, input, select, dialog, dropdown-menu, checkbox, badge, tabs, toast, calendar, popover, sheet, separator, switch, label, textarea, scroll-area, command)
Create netlify.toml with SPA redirect rules: [[redirects]] from='/*' to='/index.html' status=200

Create TypeScript types in src/types/index.ts covering all entities: Subject, Paper, Topic, Task, Tag, Column, DailyLog, TrackerEntry, RevisionSchedule, Exam, ExamSubject, Routine, Settings, Theme. All entities have soft delete flag (deletedAt).

Create Zustand stores with persist middleware in src/stores/: useSubjectStore.ts, useTaskStore.ts, useTagStore.ts, useColumnStore.ts, useDailyLogStore.ts, useTrackerStore.ts, useRevisionStore.ts, useExamStore.ts, useRoutineStore.ts, useSettingsStore.ts. Each store handles CRUD + soft delete with undo.

Create seed data in src/data/seed.ts: 7 subjects (Bangla, English, ICT, Finance, Accounting, Management, Marketing) with paper splits as specified. Default columns: 'Due Tonight', 'This Week', 'Upcoming', 'Pending', 'Done'. Default tags: 'Urgent', 'Important', 'Easy', 'Hard', 'Review'. Sample exam and routine entries.

Set up React Router in src/App.tsx with routes: / (dashboard), /tasks (to-do list/board), /daily-log (input), /trackers (3 trackers), /revision (spaced repetition), /exams (exam section), /calendar, /settings
Create src/lib/utils.ts with helper functions: cn() for classnames, formatDate, getUrgencyColor, calculateDueCategory, generateId
Create a responsive layout shell in src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx with mobile bottom navigation bar and desktop sidebar
Set up dark/light mode with system preference detection in src/stores/useSettingsStore.ts, applying theme class to document
acceptance_criteria: npm run build completes without errors and produces dist/index.html
All TypeScript types compile without errors
Zustand stores initialize with seed data on first load
React Router navigates between all defined routes
netlify.toml exists with proper SPA redirect
Mobile bottom nav and desktop sidebar layout renders
findings: Used react-day-picker v10 (latest) which has a different API than v8 used by original shadcn docs. Calendar component adapted to v10 API. TypeScript v7 deprecated baseUrl in tsconfig so used paths without baseUrl. Vite alias handles @ resolution at build time. All shadcn/ui components created manually since the CLI timed out. Build produces dist/ successfully.
